queries.question: Give me all broadsheets and tabloids where the distributor email is distribution@sainsburys.com.
queries.sql:
SELECT Newspapers.Name 
FROM Newspapers JOIN Distributors ON Newspapers.Distributor = Distributors.Name
WHERE (Newspapers.Format = 'Broadsheet' OR Newspapers.Format = 'Tabloid') AND Distributors.emailaddress = "distribution@sainburys.com"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?newspapers a :Newspapers .
  ?distributors a :Distributors .
  ?newspapers p:Distributor ?distributor_l .
  ?distributors p:name ?name_r .
  ?newspapers p:name ?name .
  ?newspapers p:Format ?format_w .
  ?newspapers p:Format ?format_w2 .
  ?distributors p:email ?emailaddress_w .
  FILTER(STR(?distributor_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?format_w) = "Broadsheet" || STR(?format_w2) = "Tabloid")) && STR(?emailaddress_w) = "distribution@sainburys.com"))
}

SELECT Newspapers.Name 
FROM Newspapers JOIN Distributors ON Newspapers.Distributor = Distributors.Name

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me all broadsheets and tabloids where the distributor email is distribution@sainsburys.com.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?newspapers a :Newspapers .
  ?distributors a :Distributors .
  ?newspapers p:Distributor ?distributor_l .
  ?distributors p:name ?name_r .
  ?newspapers p:name ?name .
  ?newspapers p:Format ?format_w .
  ?newspapers p:Format ?format_w2 .
  ?distributors p:email ?emailaddress_w .
  FILTER(STR(?distributor_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER((STR(?format_w) = "Broadsheet" || (STR(?format_w2) = "Tabloid" && STR(?emailaddress_w) = "distribution@sainburys.com")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?newspapers a :Newspapers .
  ?distributors a :Distributors .
  ?newspapers p:Distributor ?distributor_l .
  ?distributors p:name ?name_r .
  ?newspapers p:name ?name .
  ?newspapers p:Format ?format_w .
  ?newspapers p:Format ?format_w2 .
  ?distributors p:email ?emailaddress_w .
  FILTER(STR(?distributor_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?format_w) = "Broadsheet" || STR(?format_w2) = "Tabloid")) && STR(?emailaddress_w) = "distribution@sainburys.com"))
} }
}
